title: dorycnium suffruticosum var. germanicum
intro: Dorycnium suffruticosum var. germanicum, also known as German horseshoe vetch or German round-headed vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbalism, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dorycnium suffruticosum var. germanicum include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and relax muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory problems.
